underlying_goal: Implement a Leaflet-based day map feature for a Travel Planner app following a pre-written plan
friction_detail: Lint errors in useGeocode.ts required two rewrites before passing, and servers had port conflicts requiring manual cleanup.
brief_summary: User wanted to implement a Leaflet day-map feature from a plan; Claude completed 8 of 9 tasks across backend and frontend before the session hit a rate limit during manual testing.
